headline: How Is Progressive Corporation's Stock Performance Compared to Other Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks?
summary: Progressive Corporation has underperformed the Property & Casualty Insurance industry over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
